query: (cat:cs.RO OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CV OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.MA OR cat:cs.HC OR cat:stat.ML OR cat:eess.SY OR cat:eess.IV) AND submittedDate:[202606020000 TO 202606022359]

papers.title: Face versus Body Tracking for Human-Robot Interaction: An Egocentric Dataset
papers.summary: To enable meaningful human-robot interaction (HRI), a robot must continuously assess engagement by consistently tracking users over time. State-of-the-art computer vision models, however, are heavily optimized for surveillance or autonomous driving. A social robot faces distinct egocentric challenges, such as humans bouncing, obstructing each other, or leaving the frame. Frequent identity switches (IDSW) cause the robot to lose its footing mid-conversation. To address this, we introduce a novel, custom-annotated egocentric dataset collected via the Furhat robot to capture complex social dynamics. We present a systematic evaluation isolating detection errors from tracking logic, comparing face versus body tracking, and assessing the impact of extended spatial memory and appearance re-identification (ReID). Results indicate that increasing spatial memory mitigates prolonged occlusions but fails on complex dynamic events. Integrating ReID resolves complex switches but exhibits opposing effects: it substantially improves body tracking stability, yet causes facial IDSW to spike due to profile angle sensitivity. Ultimately, our optimized pipeline reduces IDSW by 49\%, mitigating interaction breakdowns. Because standard benchmarks lack dense, close-quarter occlusions, this work highlights the critical need for natively captured social dynamics to truly validate HRI perception models.
papers.comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to the 35th IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN 2026)
papers.title_zh: 人机交互的面部与身体跟踪：以自我为中心的数据集
papers.summary_zh: 为了实现有意义的人机交互 (HRI)，机器人必须通过持续跟踪用户来持续评估参与度。然而，最先进的计算机视觉模型针对监控或自动驾驶进行了大量优化。社交机器人面临着明显的以自我为中心的挑战，例如人类弹跳、互相阻碍或离开框架。频繁的身份切换（IDSW）会导致机器人在对话中失去立足点。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的、自定义注释的以自我为中心的数据集，通过 Furhat 机器人收集来捕获复杂的社会动态。我们提出了一种系统评估，将检测错误与跟踪逻辑隔离，比较面部跟踪与身体跟踪，并评估扩展空间记忆和外观重新识别（ReID）的影响。结果表明，增加空间记忆可以减轻长时间的遮挡，但在处理复杂的动态事件时却失败了。集成 ReID 解决了复杂的开关问题，但会产生相反的效果：它大大提高了身体跟踪稳定性，但由于轮廓角度敏感性而导致面部 IDSW 尖峰。最终，我们优化的管道将 IDSW 减少了 49%，从而减少了交互故障。由于标准基准缺乏密集的近距离遮挡，因此这项工作强调了对本地捕获的社会动态的迫切需求，以真正验证 HRI 感知模型。

papers.title: Agentic Relationship Harm: Benchmarking and Gating Relational Manipulation in AI Agents
papers.summary: AI agents built on large language models can assist not only legitimate tasks but also relational manipulation. AI agents can be used to help a user maintain a deceptive identity, intensify emotional dependency, isolate a target, or prepare for later extraction. We conceptualise this risk as agentic relationship harm: workflow-level assistance that can exploit recipient vulnerability, persuasive influence, and relational power asymmetry. Existing safety evaluations and generic guardrails often treat harmfulness as a property of isolated outputs, missing role-sensitive interaction patterns. To study this, we introduce a 110-prompt benchmark with balanced attacker- and victim-side cases, a relationship-specific labelling framework, and a lightweight post-generation policy gate for local agent deployments. In our evaluation, the relationship-specific gate outperforms generic safety prompting under automated judging, with no judge-identified harmful-compliance cases on the main benchmark or multi-turn stress test while preserving victim-side protective intervention. These results suggest that relationship harm is a distinct sociotechnical risk surface and that role-sensitive evaluation plus lightweight policy gating offers a practical path beyond generic refusal prompting.
papers.title_zh: 代理关系危害：人工智能代理中的基准测试和门控关系操纵
papers.summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型构建的人工智能代理不仅可以协助合法任务，还可以协助关系操作。人工智能代理可用于帮助用户维持欺骗性身份、强化情感依赖性、隔离目标或为以后的提取做准备。我们将这种风险概念化为代理关系损害：可以利用接收者脆弱性、说服力影响和关系权力不对称的工作流程级别的援助。现有的安全评估和通用护栏通常将危害性视为孤立输出的属性，缺少角色敏感的交互模式。为了研究这个问题，我们引入了一个 110 提示基准，具有平衡的攻击者和受害者方案例、特定于关系的标签框架以及用于本地代理部署的轻量级后生成策略门。在我们的评估中，特定关系门在自动判断下优于通用安全提示，在主要基准或多轮压力测试上没有法官识别的有害合规案例，同时保留了受害者方的保护性干预。这些结果表明，关系损害是一个独特的社会技术风险面，角色敏感的评估加上轻量级的政策门控提供了一条超越一般拒绝提示的实用路径。
